creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at the code, I agree with mav.

While I do have access to this hardware, I have no desire to test changes with this hardware. Every time I have, it's been a weeks long boondogle. All the hardware that we had at work aged out of the platform years ago and the sata implementation in isci had all kinds of hidden limitations. Better to not mess with it and maybe remove the driver from the tree (but that's a different issue).
